data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. THOMAS ROYAL looks well placed returning to this venue having come from this barrier to score by 2m over this distance the last time he raced here last month. History could repeat. 1. KATASTROPHEE recorded back-to-back placings before working home in good style to score by 3.6 metres at Narrabri on Sunday. The ace draw gives her the chance to back that up. 9. OTIS RISING draws on the back line this time but  is in contention again after scoring last start by a metre at Narrabri. Tricky draw for 10. LAURIE DEE but he will be fitter for a resuming fifth in stronger company.","runners":[2,1,9,10],"exclusive":false}
